title: vulkan: fix data race in mul_mat_id shader
body: I've been working on automated data race detection (see https://github.com/KhronosGroup/Vulkan-ValidationLayers/pull/11717), and it found a data race in the mul_mat_id shaders. All invocations in a subgroup were storing the same value to shared memory, but this is still technically a data race. Just store on the first invocation.
